name: RMS Titanpathia - Maiden Voyage To New York
description:
A new ocean liner has been built from the ground up, housing state-if-the-art iceberg detection systems, multiple recreations of interiors of famous ships, and an outside shell that speaks of splendid gradur. Now you, a passenger, along with 2,328 passengers and crew, will sail across the Atlantic Ocean to Great Britain in search for a vacation. The ship you are traveling aboard is called...

Titanpathia
creator: DixieLand1850
